channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Indian H-1B Worker Sues Employer For Forcing Him To Pay Rs 94 Lakh To Keep Job

media:content.media:description: The worker alleged that he was pressured into making payments by his Indian American employer

item.description: The worker, identified as Rishikesh Raj Meesala, alleged that he was pressured into making payments by his Indian American employer Sai Jitender Kalagra.
item.content:encoded: The worker, identified as Rishikesh Raj Meesala, alleged that he was pressured into making payments by his Indian American employer Sai Jitender Kalagra.

item.title: Russian Warship Fires 'Warning Shots' At British Yacht In Channel: Report

media:content.media:description: The incident apparently took place about 20 nautical miles south of the Isle of Wight.

item.description: It came days after UK commandos intercepted and boarded a suspected Russian shadow fleet vessel in the same part of the Channel, in the first such UK-led operation.
item.content:encoded: It came days after UK commandos intercepted and boarded a suspected Russian shadow fleet vessel in the same part of the Channel, in the first such UK-led operation.

item.title: Romania Honours Indian-Origin Worker For Saving 5-Year-Old From Frozen Lake

media:content.media:description: The title was formally conferred on June 4.

item.description: Both Kumar and the girl suffered severe hypothermic shock and were rushed to the hospital, where they received treatment.
item.content:encoded: Both Kumar and the girl suffered severe hypothermic shock and were rushed to the hospital, where they received treatment.

item.title: Viral 'Benadryl Challenge' Leaves US Teen Critically Ill. Here's What It Is

media:content.media:description: She was reportedly hospitalised with "zero brain activity".

item.description: Fifteen-year-old Leah Presson was hospitalised with "zero brain activity" following an attempt at this viral trend.
item.content:encoded: Fifteen-year-old Leah Presson was hospitalised with "zero brain activity" following an attempt at this viral trend.

item.title: Why This American Covid Lab Company Is Giving Millions Of Dollars In Payouts

media:content.media:description: The company has now shut down permanently.

item.description: At its peak, GS Labs handled between 20 and 30 per cent of the rapid testing market in states such as Minnesota and Washington.
item.content:encoded: At its peak, GS Labs handled between 20 and 30 per cent of the rapid testing market in states such as Minnesota and Washington.

item.title: PM Modi, Trump's G7 Handshake Ahead Of Bilateral, First Meet In 16 Months

media:content.media:description: PM Modi arrived in France to attend the G7 Summit

item.description: Prior to this interaction, the last time the two leaders met face-to-face was in February 2025 at the White House in Washington, DC, shortly after Trump's second inauguration.
item.content:encoded: Prior to this interaction, the last time the two leaders met face-to-face was in February 2025 at the White House in Washington, DC, shortly after Trump's second inauguration.

item.title: Ghost Ships Are Hiding A Bigger Risk Than Expected. They Are Floating Hazards

media:content.media:description: Cyber teams say these ship owners ignore both physical safety rules and digital security checks

item.description: The US Coast Guard's cyber teams say these ship owners often ignore both physical safety rules and digital security checks, leaving the vessels vulnerable.
item.content:encoded: The US Coast Guard's cyber teams say these ship owners often ignore both physical safety rules and digital security checks, leaving the vessels vulnerable.

item.title: Iran Deal Memo Clearly Says Tehran Will Not Have Nuclear Weapons: Trump

media:content.media:description: Trump said that he will release the text of the US-Iran memorandum in a formal setting.

item.description: Trump also said he likes the idea of sending the Iran deal to Congress for review, a request by some Republican lawmakers.
item.content:encoded: Trump also said he likes the idea of sending the Iran deal to Congress for review, a request by some Republican lawmakers.

item.title: How A Tip-Off Led FBI To Foil Attack Plot At Trump UFC Event

media:content.media:description: FBI Director Kash Patel announced the development on Tuesday in a post on X.

item.description: The White House hosted the UFC event on Sunday, which coincided with President Trump's 80th birthday and formed part of celebrations marking the nation's 250th anniversary.
item.content:encoded: The White House hosted the UFC event on Sunday, which coincided with President Trump's 80th birthday and formed part of celebrations marking the nation's 250th anniversary.

item.title: Iranian Oil Tankers Resume Shipping After US Deal: Report

media:content.media:description: Iran media said the operation to lift the naval blockade has been implemented.

item.description: Three Iranian oil tankers are currently sailing in the northern Indian Ocean, said Iranian media
item.content:encoded: Three Iranian oil tankers are currently sailing in the northern Indian Ocean, said Iranian media

item.title: FBI Foiled Plot To Attack White House During UFC Event: Kash Patel

media:content.media:description: Trump on Sunday joined thousands of fans at the unprecedented White House fights.

item.description: The "UFC Freedom 250" event -- which also fell on Trump's 80th birthday -- was meant to kick off this year's festivities for the 250th anniversary of US independence.
item.content:encoded: The "UFC Freedom 250" event -- which also fell on Trump's 80th birthday -- was meant to kick off this year's festivities for the 250th anniversary of US independence.

item.title: US Military To Build War-Ready Weapons Stockpile In Australia

media:content.media:description: The US Marine Corps began global prepositioning of military supplies during the Cold War.

item.description: The development of the stockpile, a first for the Marine Corps in Australia, comes as the United States is keen to leverage the continent's strategic location in the South Pacific to counter China's rapid military build-up, analysts said.
item.content:encoded: The development of the stockpile, a first for the Marine Corps in Australia, comes as the United States is keen to leverage the continent's strategic location in the South Pacific to counter China's rapid military build-up, analysts said.

item.title: 'If Israel Cannot Handle Hezbollah, Syria Will Do The Job': Trump

media:content.media:description: Trump praised Syrian President Ahmed al-Sharaa.

item.description: "If Israel can't do the job (against Hezbollah) without killing everyone else, than he (Sharaa) will do the job. Syria will do the job," Trump said.
item.content:encoded: "If Israel can't do the job (against Hezbollah) without killing everyone else, than he (Sharaa) will do the job. Syria will do the job," Trump said.

item.title: Dog In Knicks Jersey Shot By Police After Neighbour Mistakes Cheers For Distress

media:content.media:description: The dog was a Golden Retriever-Saint Bernard-poodle mix.

item.description: A viral photo shows her two-year-old dog named Jameson, dressed in a Knicks jersey for the occasion.
item.content:encoded: A viral photo shows her two-year-old dog named Jameson, dressed in a Knicks jersey for the occasion.

item.title: "Won't Withdraw, Won't Commit Suicide": Israel Envoy On Action In Lebanon

media:content.media:description: Israel's ambassador to India, Reuven Azar, spoke to NDTV's Aditya Raj Kaul.

item.description: Israel envoy said Tel Aviv would not withdraw from its buffer zone in southern Lebanon until the Lebanese army demonstrates it can independently prevent Hezbollah from rearming.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1113861/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Israel envoy said Tel Aviv would not withdraw from its buffer zone in southern Lebanon until the Lebanese army demonstrates it can independently prevent Hezbollah from rearming.

item.title: Cyber Leaders Urge Trump Administration To Ease Restrictions on Anthropic AI Models

media:content.media:description: The Commerce Department did not immediately respond to a request for comment on Monday

item.description: The letter said it is dangerous to take away the best cyber defense capabilities "without a good reason" when America's adversaries are rapidly advancing.
item.content:encoded: The letter said it is dangerous to take away the best cyber defense capabilities "without a good reason" when America's adversaries are rapidly advancing.

item.title: Decisions On Use of Force "Cannot Be Transferred to Machines": India At UN

media:content.media:description: India was among 30 countries that contributed to the resulting Secretary-General's report

item.description: Speaking at informal exchanges on artificial intelligence in the military domain held in Geneva on June 15, Indian Ambassador Charanjeet Singh said human judgement and oversight must be preserved "throughout the AI lifecycle", even as armed forces worldwide rapidly fold AI into their operations.
item.content:encoded: Speaking at informal exchanges on artificial intelligence in the military domain held in Geneva on June 15, Indian Ambassador Charanjeet Singh said human judgement and oversight must be preserved "throughout the AI lifecycle", even as armed forces worldwide rapidly fold AI into their operations.

item.title: LIVE Updates: Protests In Iran Over Deal, Netanyahu Says Israel Saved From Annihilation
item.description: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Netanyahu pledged that Iran would never be allowed to acquire nuclear weapons, regardless of the terms of any agreement.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Netanyahu pledged that Iran would never be allowed to acquire nuclear weapons, regardless of the terms of any agreement.

item.title: Iran Took Help From "Senior Psychologists" To Negotiate With Trump: Report

media:content.media:description: The unusual tactic was used to better navigate Trump's ever-changing temper.

item.description: According to the Iranian official, who was not authorised to speak publicly, the psychiatric professionals began assisting Iranian negotiators following the initial round of bilateral talks in Islamabad in April.
item.content:encoded: According to the Iranian official, who was not authorised to speak publicly, the psychiatric professionals began assisting Iranian negotiators following the initial round of bilateral talks in Islamabad in April.

item.title: Opinion: Inside The "Rational Frenzy" Driving The AI Super-Cycle
item.description: AI investment has become a macroeconomic fact in the West. The forces that make it impossible to escape are the same ones that have stopped the market from pricing it.
item.content:encoded: AI investment has become a macroeconomic fact in the West. The forces that make it impossible to escape are the same ones that have stopped the market from pricing it.
